## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Change scope

- [ ] UI or interaction behavior
- [ ] Browser capture, storage, clipboard, or GitHub handoff
- [ ] Generated Markdown output
- [ ] Documentation or automation only

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Manually checked the extension in Chrome or a compatible Chromium browser
- [ ] Added or updated focused tests where behavior changed
- [ ] Updated README and privacy documentation where needed

## Security, privacy, and accessibility

- [ ] No secrets, private URLs, personal data, customer data, or sensitive screenshots were added
- [ ] Privacy and data-handling implications were considered
- [ ] Keyboard navigation and visible focus behavior remain usable
